name: AGC Sports Center
description: AGC Sports Center is a place to play pickleball in Gulf Shores, AL. There are 6 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. The courts can be reserved. The facility includes amenities like food, restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Bay Minette Pickleball Courts
description: The Recreation Department also has paddles and balls for rent to help you learn the game!
open_play_schedule: For more information about socials or to schedule a tournament, call the Recreation Department at 251-580-2546.

name: Daphne Tennis & Pickleball Complex at W.O. Lott Park
description: Daphne Tennis & Pickleball Complex at W.O. Lott Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Daphne, AL. There are 12 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The courts cannot be reserved. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, lights, wheelchair accessibility, and trainers or lessons.

name: Davis Barn
description: Come play pickleball at Davis Barn in Fairhope, AL! There are 2 acrylic courts. 1 is indoors and 1 is outdoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are private.

name: Fairhope Recreation Center
description: Fairhope Recreation Center is a place to play pickleball in Fairhope, AL. There are 3 indoor acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Fairhope United Methodist Church
description: Come play pickleball at Fairhope United Methodist Church in Fairhope, AL! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private.

name: Foley Assembly of God
description: Come play pickleball at Foley Assembly of God in Foley, AL! There are 3 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Amenities include restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Foley Pickleball Courts
description: Foley Pickleball Courts is a place to play pickleball in Foley, AL. There are 12 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

description: Gulf Shores Church of Christ is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Gulf Shores, AL. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts cannot be reserved.

name: Gulf Shores Cultural Center
description: Gulf Shores Cultural Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Gulf Shores, AL. There are 3 indoor acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms and water. A one-time fee is required to play. The courts cannot be reserved.
open_play_schedule: The Cultural Center is open during School System schedule. They are closed in the summer when school is not in session.  They open back up when school starts back in August.
fees: Fee required — Members of the Gulf Shores Recreation Department play for free.  Non-members fee is $10 per day but includes all of the Recreation Department Amenities for that day.  Those who qualify

description: Come play pickleball at Gulf Shores State Park campground in Gulf Shores, AL! There are 6 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to lights, restrooms, and water. The courts are private.

description: Come play pickleball at Lake Osprey RV Resort in Elberta, AL! There are 3 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are private.

description: Courts are available from 8 AM until dusk, unless there is a specific event occurring.
